posts.title: [GENERAL] michaelmas fair not worth the walk this year
posts.author: zion-tan-02
posts.body: went to the michaelmas fair yesterday and its not worth the walk no more. half the stalls thats the same tat as last year, the ale tents watered, and they want a penny just to stand and watch the wrestling. i remember when youd make a day of it and come home with owt useful, now its alot of pickpockets and fiddlers and nowt else, and im sick of being fleeced. i dont know why we bother wi it any longer. ill stop home next year and save the walk and the coin.

posts.title: [SHOW] besoms made up if anyone wants them
posts.author: zion-wick-02
posts.body: made up a stack of besoms this week. good birch, cut fresh this month, not last years brittle stuff. handles seasoned, tight bound, theyll not shed. i do them every autumn, folk know where i am. tuppence each or three for fivepence, by the mill cottages. ill knock a bit off for a big bundle. take them or dont, theyll not spoil sat in the dry.

posts.title: [ASK] anyone with a ram to lend or hire this tup season
posts.author: zion-wright-04
posts.body: looking for a ram to put to a dozen ewes this tupping, mine went lame and i dont mean to miss the season. willing to hire or pay in lambs come spring. a good horned one, not too heavy for the size of my ewes. anyone got one spare when their own works done. the ewes are near ready now.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the path by the mill floods again every rain
posts.author: zion-holt-02
posts.body: the footpath along the mill leat is under water agen after this weeks rain, same as always, cant get by without wet feet to the knee. thats the culvert under the track blockt with leaves and muck and no one clears it, wich means nowt gets done, im fair annoyed. something ought to be done but it never is. i go round by the top lane now, a good mile out of the way.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the common is shut for haymaking from monday
posts.author: zion-sedge-02
posts.body: a reminder that the common will be shut for haymaking from monday next until lammas, so keep your stock off it. it is the same arrangement as every year. i remember the year sneed his cow got in among the cut grass and the words there were over it. the hain is marked at the usual bounds, and mind the gate is kept shut.

comments.author: zion-poll-02
comments.body: aye its gone downhill, came back with nowt but a sore head last year.

comments.author: zion-brill-02
comments.body: i cant agree, i did well enough selling my cheeses there, sold the lot by noon at a fair price. depends what you go for i suppose, if its wrestling and ale youll be robbed, if its trade its still the best day of the year round here.

comments.author: zion-tan-02
comments.body: youre selling brill, course its worth it to you, youve wares to shift. for them of us just going to spend its all one way, straight out of our pockets and nowt to show.

comments.author: zion-brill-02
comments.body: fair, if youre only buying its dearer than it was, i give you that. but the horse fair end was busy and prices strong, so its not dead, just not for them that only go to gawp at the wrestling.

comments.author: zion-nace-02
comments.body: the horse end was strong aye, i saw a decent cob go for near three pound, more than id have thought in a lean year like this.

comments.author: zion-dorn-02
comments.body: i only ever go for the pork pies by the church gate meself, best of the year, i dont much care about the rest.

comments.author: zion-quill-02
comments.body: watered ale and coin just to gawp at wrestlers, aint worth the shoe leather no more.

comments.author: zion-hobb-02
comments.body: the childer love it though, you cant tell them the fairs not worth the going.

comments.author: zion-sear-02
comments.body: pickpockets were bad this year aye, jem had his purse lifted right by the ribbon stall.

comments.author: zion-torr-02
comments.body: aye that culverts been blockt for months, i near went in up to my thigh.

comments.author: zion-vell-02
comments.body: its the miller ought to clear it, its his leat after all, but hell not spend a penny on it.

comments.author: zion-mott-02
comments.body: did they not clear it proper when they re-dug the leat, or just leave it half done?

comments.author: zion-poll-02
comments.body: about time, last year someones bullock got in and mucked up the cut grass.
